extension.description: Search across UTF-8, Shift_JIS, EUC-JP, and other encodings in VS Code and Cursor.
command.searchInWorkspace.title: Grep Multi Encode: Search in Workspace
command.clearResults.title: Grep Multi Encode: Clear Results
command.cancelSearch.title: Grep Multi Encode: Cancel Search
command.openSettings.title: Grep Multi Encode: Open Settings
command.copyAbsolutePath.title: Grep Multi Encode: Copy Absolute Path
command.copyRelativePath.title: Grep Multi Encode: Copy Relative Path
command.revealFileInOs.title: Grep Multi Encode: Reveal in File Explorer / Finder

view.search.name: Search
view.results.name: Results
configuration.title: Grep Multi Encode
configuration.enabledEncodings.descripti: Encodings to try in order (first = highest priority) when searching each file.
configuration.languagePresets.descriptio: Language presets used to preselect likely encodings.
configuration.excludeGlobs.description: Glob patterns to exclude from search. You can edit or remove default entries.
configuration.includeGlobs.description: If non-empty, only files matching at least one glob are searched (merged with the view's “files to include”).
configuration.searchRoots.description: Workspace-relative directories to search under (empty = entire workspace). Merged with the view's folder scope.
configuration.searchTriggerMode.descript: enter: run search on Enter / Search only. debounce: also run after you pause typing (see searchDebounceMs).
configuration.searchDebounceMs.descripti: Delay in milliseconds before debounced search runs (clamped 100–5000).
configuration.liveSearchMinQueryLength.d: Minimum trimmed query length to start a debounced search.
configuration.excludeExtensions.descript: File extensions to exclude from search. You can edit or remove default entries.
configuration.excludeFileNames.descripti: Exact file names or simple patterns to exclude from search.
configuration.useGitIgnore.description: Honor .gitignore rules during file discovery when possible.
configuration.maxInitialMatchedFiles.des: Maximum number of files to show in the initial result set.
configuration.maxMatchesPerFile.descript: Maximum number of matches collected per file.
configuration.maxTotalMatches.descriptio: Maximum number of total matches collected in a search.
configuration.maxFileSizeBytes.descripti: Maximum file size in bytes to scan.
configuration.concurrency.description: Maximum number of files processed in parallel.
configuration.followSymlinks.description: Whether to follow symbolic links during file discovery.
